meta.title: Slatly, Apple Watch controller for Somfy blinds
meta.description: Control your Somfy exterior venetian blinds straight from Apple Watch. Tilt with the Digital Crown, drag to close. No iPhone, no hub required at runtime.

hero.title: Your blinds, on your wrist.
hero.sub: Control Somfy exterior venetian blinds straight from Apple Watch. Tilt the slats with the Digital Crown, drag down to close. No iPhone, no hub, no bridge needed at runtime.
hero.meta: Works with Somfy Connexoon, TaHoma and Cozytouch · watchOS 10+ · Available in EN, CS, DE, FR, ES

features.title: Touch nothing else.
features.f1_body: Rotate the Digital Crown to tilt slats from open to fully closed. Haptic feedback at every stop.
features.f2_body: A vertical swipe sets exact closure 0–100%. Closure and tilt commit together, one command, one motor cycle.
features.f3_body: "Morning", "Shade", "Night". Save multi-blind presets and run them with a single tap. Edit on iPhone, run from the wrist.
features.f4_body: The watch talks to Somfy cloud directly. Leave your iPhone behind, your blinds still listen.

showcase.eyebrow: A whole house at a glance
showcase.title: One swipe per blind. Or all of them at once.
showcase.body: List every blind on your Somfy account, themed with the colour you actually have on your house. Open the All view to crown-control every blind in the room in parallel. Stop, My, set tilt, they all answer.

how.title: How it works.
how.s1_body: Open Slatly on your iPhone, enter your Somfy / TaHoma credentials. They never leave your device unencrypted.
how.s2_body: Credentials travel through iCloud Keychain to your paired Apple Watch, usually within seconds. No extra pairing required.
how.s3_body: From here on, the watch talks to Somfy cloud directly over LTE or Wi-Fi. Free your hands; the blinds answer to your wrist.

faq.title: Frequently asked.
faq.a1: Any Somfy ExteriorVenetianBlind device registered on a Connexoon, TaHoma or Cozytouch box. If you can open/close them in the Somfy app, Slatly will see them.
faq.q2: Do I need an iPhone nearby?
faq.a2: Only the first time, to sign in. After credentials sync via iCloud Keychain, the Watch app runs fully standalone over LTE or Wi-Fi.
faq.a3: In Apple's iCloud Keychain, end-to-end encrypted under your Apple ID. The app itself never sends them to any third party, only to Somfy's official OAuth endpoint.
faq.a4: Yes. The Swift code, the OverkizKit library, and this website are all on GitHub. Contributions and translations are welcome.
faq.q5: When is it on the App Store?
faq.a5: A TestFlight build is in active polish. Public App Store release follows once the iCloud sync capability work is signed off. Join the TestFlight to get early access.

cta.title: Ready to ditch the remote?
cta.body: Get Slatly on your Apple Watch and never reach for the wall switch again.

footer.fineprint: Slatly is an independent project not affiliated with or endorsed by Somfy SA. Somfy®, TaHoma®, Connexoon® and Cozytouch® are trademarks of their respective owners.
